titleStmt.title: SII 35.98: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 98. (A.R. No. 45 of 1950-51.)

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tailapadēva (son of Śāntivarma) is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama kāla 52, Plavaṁga, Vaiśakha śu. 10, Thursday. The details of date equate with A.D. 1127, April 23, Saturday.

It records a gift of land for offerings and repairs by Tribhuvana-paṇḍita, son (i.e. disciple) of Rāmasiṅgi-paṇḍita who extended the Kaḍambēśvara temple making it five shrined and adding the maṇḍapa. The chief was governing Banavāsi-12000 and Hānuṁgal-500.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ śāntivarmadēvaru banavāsipaṁnirccāsira pānuṁgalainūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirelu svasti śrīmaturāmasiṁgi paṇḍitadēvarreḍevoḷa tippaṟa baḷiyabāḍaṁ Aḷayasirivūralu prabhusāmyaṁ geyyuttamiḻdu ccāḷukya vikramakālada 13 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada māgha suddha 10 sōmavā
radaṁdu śrīmatkaḍaṁbēśvaradēvara pratiṣṭeyaṁ māḍidaru svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ tailapadēvaru banavāsipannirccāsira hānuṁgalainūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamiralu rāmasiṁgipaṇḍitadēvara putraṁ svasti śrīmatribhuvana paṇḍitadēvaru ccāḷukyavikramakālada 52 neya plavaṁgasaṁvatsarada vaiśā

kha suddha 10 brahavāradaṁdu śrīmatkaḍaṁbēśvaradēvargge paṁcakūṭamāge pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi dēvālyamaṁ maṁṭapamaṁ māḍisi dēvaraṁgabhōga nivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajirnnōddhārakkaṁ biṭṭa dharmaveṁteṁdaḍe dēvara teṁka parisūtrada ra rava
geṟeya keḷage tōṁṭa vasugeya kammaṁ muppattaydu mattavā keṟeya nīrvvari dēvariṁ baḍaga bāduṁbeyaṁ paḍuva kaṭṭina baccaliṁ māḍabiṭṭa gaṟde mattaroṁdu kammadirppattaliṁ baḍaga dēvara pūjārige biṭṭa gaḻde kammaṁ mūvattu dēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gāṇavoṁdu bi
ṭṭa dharmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgeyargghyatīrthadoḷu caturvvēdha pāragarappa brāhmaṇargge sahasrakavileyoḷ kāḷasahitaṁ vubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁndharā ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāya jāyatē krimi . ©
Digital edition of SII 35.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
